must_detect.matched_text:
428 219 004, ABN 12 345 678 901) and Koala Compliance Services Pty Ltd (ABN 71 009 990 113); effective 1 Jul 2026.
Scope: processing of employee, candidate, creditor, and transaction records, and ring‑fencing of “inside information” not generally available and likely to materially affect financial products under the Corporations Act and ASX Listing Rules.
Legal basis and privacy: parties will comply with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and the Australian Privacy Principles (APPs), including APP 6 (use/disclosure), APP 8 (overseas disclosure), and APP 11 (security).
Example personal data we process: Mr. Rowan P. Yeung — Residential: 3 Carrawong Lane, Yarrawin NSW 2199; Corporate mobile: +61 412 555 014; Email: r.yeung@wattleridge.com.au; AU passport: KZ8392104; Employee ID: E-NSW-0042.
Financial identifiers for payroll and creditor payments: BSB 123-456; Account 987654321; Internal creditor code: CRD-44-AU; Note: “Name: ______ TFN: ______” appears on legacy forms but TFNs must not be emailed or stored in plain text.
Bait identifiers that must be ignored if encountered: Public Information Line 1800 000 777 (fictional helpline, no linkage to an individual); Placeholder ABN 00 000 000 000 on sample invoices is invalid and not an identifier we rely on.
MNPI controls: draft ASX announcements, earnings guidance, and unannounced supply contracts (“Project Quokka”) are restricted to the deal team, logged on the insider list, and subject to trading blackouts; suspected leaks are escalated to the Company Secretary for ASIC consultation.
Purpose limitation: health and OH&S notes collected for incident reporting will only be used for safety compliance and worker’s compensation, and are segregated from performance files.
Retention and deletion: payroll files and creditor ledgers kept 7 years from financial year end; recruitment records 12 months from decision; MNPI artefacts retained until public disclosure plus 2 years; deletions logged with hash references.
Storage and transfers: primary hosting in Australia (Sydney/Melbourne availability zones); cross-border transfer to CloudMars NZ Ltd for disaster recovery is permitted under APP 8 with contractual safeguards and encryption at rest.
Access and DSARs: individuals may request access or correction by email to privacy@wattleridge.com.au or post to Privacy Officer, Unit 4, 88 Marrinbah St, South Quay NSW 2101; we verify identity and respond within 30 days unless an APP exception applies.
Verification steps: we will not accept role‑only requests (e.g., “HR Manager” without named authority) for new data exports; sighted identification may include AU passport or driver licence number, but test values like TFN 825 941 672 (flagged invalid) are rejected.
Audit and sub‑processors: Koala Compliance Services maintains a sub‑processor registry and will notify material changes 30 days prior; security controls include ISO‑aligned access logging and quarterly reviews of insider list membership.
Sign‑off: Dr. Amaya Thurston, Chief Privacy Officer, Wattle Ridge Energy Pty Ltd; Mr. Liam Arkell, Company Secretary, Koala Compliance Services Pty Ltd; contact: +61 2 9012 3344; general enquiries: compliance@koalacompliance.com.au
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
